# documents/

React components managing document lifecycle UI in the web app: upload zone with drag-and-drop validation, document cards with status indicators, and confirmation modals for replacement/deletion operations.

## Contents

**Upload & Display**
- [upload-zone.tsx](./upload-zone.tsx) — UploadZone component with drag-and-drop, file filtering by ACCEPTED_MIME_TYPES array, input reset after selection
- [document-card.tsx](./document-card.tsx) — DocumentCard renders document metadata, FileIcon/StatusBadge composition, DropdownMenu with replace/delete actions
- [document-list.tsx](./document-list.tsx) — DocumentList grid container with loading (3x Skeleton), empty state, populated DocumentCard mapping

**Confirmation Modals**
- [replace-dialog.tsx](./replace-dialog.tsx) — ReplaceDialog confirmation modal, Cancel/Replace buttons, loading state disablement
- [delete-dialog.tsx](./delete-dialog.tsx) — DeleteDialog destructive action modal, "Keep Document"/"Delete Document" buttons

## Component Architecture

UploadZone → DocumentList → DocumentCard → ReplaceDialog/DeleteDialog forms a unidirectional data flow. Parent page passes onUpload to UploadZone, onDelete/onReplace to DocumentList. DocumentCard delegates file input triggering via replaceInputRef, emits events upward. Modals receive open/onOpenChange/onConfirm props from page-level state.

## File Type Support

upload-zone.tsx defines two constants:
- ACCEPTED_TYPES string: `.pdf,.xlsx,.md,.txt` (HTML input accept)
- ACCEPTED_MIME_TYPES array: `application/pdf`, `application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet`, `text/markdown`, `text/plain`

Validation uses MIME type matching with `.md`/`.txt` extension fallback for browser inconsistencies.

## Status Rendering

document-card.tsx StatusBadge maps document.status to Badge variants:
- "pending" → "Queued" (default variant)
- "processing" → "Indexing..." with animated Progress
- "ready" → "Ready" + "{chunkCount} sections indexed"
- "error" → "Failed" (destructive variant)

## Time Formatting

document-card.tsx formatDate(dateString) produces relative timestamps: "Just now" (<60s), "{n}m ago" (<60min), "{n}h ago" (<24hr), "{n}d ago" (<7d), "MMM DD" (older). Thresholds: 60000ms/min, 3600000ms/hr, 86400000ms/day.

## Behavioral Contracts

**File Input Reset Pattern** (document-card.tsx, upload-zone.tsx):
```tsx
<input ref={inputRef} onChange={handler} />
// After processing:
inputRef.current.value = ''
```
Ensures same file re-upload triggers onChange event.

**Drag State Styling** (upload-zone.tsx):
- Active: `border-primary bg-muted`
- Disabled: `opacity-50 pointer-events-none`

**Modal Button Disablement**:
Both replace-dialog.tsx and delete-dialog.tsx disable action buttons when `loading === true`.
